sections.paragraph:
- Original: στερεόω

- Transliteration: Stereoo

- Phonetic: ster-eh-o'-o

- Definition:

1. to make solid, make firm, strengthen, make strong

a. of the body of anyone

- Origin: from G4731

- TDNT entry: 17:09,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4731; to solidify that is confirm (literally or figuratively): - establish receive strength make strong.
